memories.value: First run. Query cs_findings and tickets to discover customer feedback themes. Read product_roadmap from North Star to understand current priorities. Begin clustering signals.
Will build signal clusters from customer support findings and ticket analysis across first 3 runs. Track frequency and impact per theme.
Will establish initial top-10 feature priority ranking after first signal clustering pass. Re-rank every run based on new signals and roadmap alignment.
Will learn which signal patterns lead to high-impact features vs noise. Track gh_issues creation accuracy over time.
